falafel-cobb-salad.name: Falafel Cobb Salad
instructions: Mix water and falafel mix together in a bowl; let stand for 10 minutes. Form mixture into 12 patties, about 1/2-inch thick.
Heat oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C).

Fry falafel patties, working in batches, in the hot oil until golden brown and crisp, 3 to 5 minutes. Transfer cooked falafel to a paper towel-lined plate using a slotted spoon; season with salt. Cool falafel to room temperature; break into pieces.
Whisk sour cream, milk, cucumber, parsley, and 1/8 teaspoon salt together in a bowl until dressing is smooth and creamy; refrigerate.
Spread greens onto serving plates. Arrange tomatoes, avocado, bacon, eggs, feta cheese, and falafel in rows over the greens. Drizzle dressing over each salad.

falafel-spiced-turkey-burgers.name: Falafel-spiced Turkey Burgers

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep:
thinly sliced red onion, mint leaves, and
hot sauce (for serving)

ingredients.item: A mortar and pestle or spice mill

instructions:
Stir zest of 1 small lemon, 1 garlic clove, finely grated, ¼ cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, ¼ cup tahini, 3 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, 2 Tbsp. finely chopped mint, ½ tsp. sugar, and 1 Tbsp. water in a small bowl until smooth. Season generously with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper. Chill until ready to serve.
Do ahead: Yogurt sauce can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and keep chilled.
Coarsely crush 1 Tbsp. coriander seeds and 2 tsp. cumin seeds with mortar and pestle or very coarsely grind in spice mill.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium. Cook 1 small white or yellow onion, finely chopped, stirring occasionally, until softened and translucent, 5–7 minutes. Add spice mixture, 2 garlic cloves, finely grated, and ½ tsp. ground cinnamon; cook, stirring often, until spices are fragrant, about 1 minute. Scrape onion mixture into a large bowl; wipe out skillet and reserve.

Add 1 large egg, 1 cup finely chopped cilantro, ½ cup panko, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt to onion mixture, season with freshly ground pepper, and mix to combine. Add 1 lb. ground turkey and gently mix with your hands until just incorporated (do not overmix). Using damp hands, form into four 4"-diameter patties.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in reserved skillet over medium-high. Season patties generously on both sides with salt and pepper. Working in 2 batches and adding more oil between batches if needed, cook patties, undisturbed, until deeply browned underneath, about 5 minutes. Flip and cook, undisturbed, until deeply browned on second side and cooked through (an instant-read thermometer inserted into center should register 165°), about 4 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack. Wipe out skillet.
Working in batches, toast 4 soft sesame seed buns, split, cut side down, in same skillet until golden brown and crisp around edges, about 3 minutes. Transfer to rack.

Arrange burgers, buns, torn romaine lettuce, thinly sliced red onion, and mint leaves on plates with yogurt sauce and hot sauce alongside and let everyone build burgers as desired.
Do ahead: Patties can be formed 2 hours ahead. Transfer to a large plate; cover with plastic wrap and chill.

farro-with-roasted-mushrooms.name: Farro With Roasted Mushrooms
instructions: Soak farro in 6 cups cold water in a large bowl 1–2 hours (this will help it cook more evenly and in less time).

Meanwhile, cook spinach in a large pot of boiling generously salted water just until wilted and bright green, about 45 seconds. Immediately transfer to a large bowl of ice water and swish around in water to cool down as quickly as possible. Drain spinach and gently squeeze to remove excess liquid.

Blend spinach, ¼ cup oil, and ¼ cup water in a blender on low to break down spinach, then increase speed to high and blend until smooth, about 2 minutes. Pour through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl; discard solids. Cover and chill spinach purée until ready to use.

Drain farro and place in a large saucepan along with shallots, garlic, thyme, bay leaves, and 8 cups water. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, then reduce heat and simmer gently, stirring occasionally, until farro is tender but still al dente (you don’t want grains to burst), 12–18 minutes. Drain, discard aromatics, and return farro to saucepan. Set a few peanuts aside for serving; coarsely chop remaining peanuts and add to farro.

Preheat oven to 425°. Toss both mushrooms and ¼ cup oil in a medium bowl. Spread out in a single layer on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet (this lets heat circulate all around and helps the mushrooms crisp instead of steam). Season with salt and roast until mushrooms are browned, soft, and crisp around the edges, 25–30 minutes. Let cool slightly, then return to bowl and toss with 1 Tbsp. lemon juice; set aside.

Add 3 Tbsp. water to farro and gently reheat over medium-low until just warmed through. Remove from heat and mix in just enough spinach purée to coat grains (you don’t want the mixture to be saucy; you’ll have some sauce leftover), then remaining 1 Tbsp. lemon juice. Drizzle with oil; season with salt.
Spoon farro into shallow bowls and layer mushrooms over top. Drizzle with a little more oil; finely grate reserved peanuts over top.

fasting-brownies-without-eggs-and-butter.name: Fasting Brownies Without Eggs And Butter
fasting-brownies-without-eggs-and-butter.original_name: Νηστίσιμα brownies χωρίς αυγά και βούτυρο
instructions: Preheat the evening to 180°C to make the fasting brownies.
Butter a small baking pan of 20×30 cm.
In bowls, mix the flower, sugar, cocoa, baking and salt.
Pour with the vegetable milk or water, oil and vanilla and generally mix until they become like a cake mixture.
Add the chocolate, walnuts and plums and mix gently.
We're emptying the pan.
Bake for about 35 minutes until it stabilizes and the surface makes a crust.
Allow the sweet to cool well to cut into pieces.

fennel-celery-salad-with-blue-cheese-and.name: Fennel-celery Salad With Blue Cheese And Walnuts

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden brown, 5–8 minutes; let cool.

Finely chop 1 shallot half, then thinly slice the other half crosswise; set sliced shallot aside. Combine chopped shallot, mustard, sugar, and ¼ cup vinegar in a resealable jar. Add oil and season with salt and pepper. Cover and shake to emulsify; set vinaigrette aside.
Toss figs, reserved sliced shallot, and remaining ¼ cup vinegar in a small bowl; let sit until figs and shallots are softened, at least 30 minutes.

Just before serving, toss fennel, celery, blue cheese, and toasted walnuts in a large bowl. Drain figs and shallot and add to bowl. Drizzle with vinaigrette and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper.

Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill. Figs and shallot can be soaked 4 hours ahead; store covered at room temperature. Fennel and celery can be sliced 4 hours ahead; place in a large bowl. Cover with a damp paper towel and chill.

filipino-embutido.name: Filipino Embutido

ingredients.item: Plus 1 0.5 teaspoons diamond crystal or 4 0.5 teaspoons morton kosher salt; plus more

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Gently lower 6 eggs into a large saucepan of boiling salted water and cook 5 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water and let cool 2 minutes. Drain and carefully peel.

Mix remaining 6 eggs in a large bowl with garlic, Parmesan, panko, butter, pickles, olives, raisins, vinegar, both paprikas, pepper, and 2 Tbsp. plus  1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 4½ tsp. Morton salt, then mix in pork.

Line two 9x5" loaf pans with a sheet of foil, leaving 3" overhang on long sides. Lightly coat with nonstick spray. Divide half of meat mixture between pans. Place 3 boiled eggs in a line down the center of each pan. Top with remaining meat mixture, packing tightly around eggs and making sure they are completely covered.

Mix ketchup and Worcestershire sauce in a small bowl and spread over both embutidos. Bake until an instant-read thermometer inserted into several places, avoiding eggs if possible, registers 155°, 55–70 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes.
Transfer embutidos to a platter; slice.
Do Ahead: Embutidos can be baked 4 days ahead. Let cool, cover and chill.

fillets-in-the-air-fryer-teleculinaria.name: Fillets In The Air Fryer
instructions: Shave the lemon peel and squeeze the juice. Season the fillets with salt, pepper, scrape and lemon juice, reserve. Undo the nut, add 2 spoons (soup) of the oil and mix well.
Forre a air fryer com papel vegetal anti-aderente para que fique com as laterais cobertas com o papel vegetal, de modo a fazer um "cesto".

Peel the onion, pinch it roughly and put it on air fryer. Clean the seed pepper, cut it into small pieces and add to the onion. Cut the bacon into strips and add it to the airfryer. Then water with the rest of the oil. Season with salt and pepper, add the oregano and wrap.
Set 180 degrees, for 10 minutes, mid-time open and stir.

After 10 minutes add the fillets and water them with the marinade. Program 180o for 10 minutes. Then cover with the bread and program 200o for 5 minutes. Sprinkle with chopped coriander and serve with cooked potatoes.

finnish-pulla.name: Finnish Pulla
instructions: Warm milk in a small saucepan over medium heat until it bubbles, then remove from heat. Let cool until lukewarm.
Stir together warm water and yeast in a large bowl. Let stand until yeast softens and begins to form a creamy foam, about 5 minutes.

Stir lukewarm milk, sugar, 4 beaten eggs, salt, and cardamom into yeast mixture. Beat in 2 cups flour until combined. Add 3 cups flour and beat until dough is smooth and elastic. Add melted butter; beat until glossy. Mix in remaining flour until dough is stiff.
Transfer dough to a floured surface, cover with an inverted mixing bowl, and let rest for 15 minutes.

Knead dough until smooth and satiny, then place in a lightly greased mixing bowl and turn dough to coat. Cover with a dish towel; let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour. Punch down dough; let rise again until almost doubled, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (205 degrees C). Grease 2 baking sheets.

Turn dough out again onto a floured surface and divide into 3 equal pieces. Divide each piece into thirds. Roll each piece into a 12- to 16-inch strip. Braid 3 strips into a loaf to get 3 large, braided loaves.
Lift loaves onto the prepared baking sheets. Cover with a dish towel and let rise for 20 minutes.
Beat together 1 egg and water in a small bowl. Brush over loaves and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake in the preheated oven until the top is golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes. Check occasionally because the bottoms of loaves can burn quickly.

finnish-american-flatbread.name: Finnish-american Flatbread
instructions: Stir together warm water and sugar in a large bowl. Sprinkle yeast over the top and let stand until foamy, about 5 minutes.

Stir in whole wheat flour, rye flour, and salt. Mix in bread flour, 1 cup at a time, until dough is not sticky. Knead on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, about 10 minutes. Place in an oiled bowl, turning to coat. Set aside to rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Punch down dough and divide into 4 or 5 portions. Form each portion into a ball; let rise again until doubled, about 20 minutes.
Place each ball onto a baking sheet and flatten out into an oval, 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick. Poke holes all over using the tines of a fork. Let rise again until doubled, 20 to 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until browned on the top and bottom, about 20 minutes. Brush the tops with melted butter while still warm.

fish-patties-teleculinaria.name: Fish Patties
instructions: Prepare the filling: cook the fish in salted water, then remove for a dish and let it cool. Coat the broth and reserve. Wipe the fish skin and pimples and shred it.

Sauce the onion, garlic and garlic, chopped, in a pot with melted margarine, then add the flour and mix well. Add 125 ml of the fish broth and the milk, slowly and always stirring, until you get a cream. Retrieve salt and season with pepper, nutmeg and lemon juice. Add chopped parsley and fish, wrap and let it warm up a bit. Remove from the fire and reserve.

Prepare the dough: Light a wide pot with water, margarine and lemon peel. Season with salt and let it boil. Dispose of the lemon peel, add the flour, at once, stir until the dough rises from the bottom of the pot and then form a ball.

Put the dough on a floury bench, let it trim, then crush it slightly, split it into two balls and extend it finely with the roll. Have small portions of the filling in the center, away from each other, fold the dough on top and, with a glass, cut in the shape of a rissol. Pass the rissols through the beaten eggs and then by grated bread and fry them in hot oil on both sides until they are golden. Drain on absorbent paper.

Prepare the accompaniment: cook the peas and carrots in salted water, then drain, cool and mix with the corn, previously drained. Involve mayonnaise and lead to cold. Serve as an accompaniment of the rhyssols.
You can freeze the rissols after you've had it and fry them another time.

french-dip-sandwich-recipe-comedera.name: French Dip Sandwich Recipe

ingredients.item: 2  panes tipo baguette o ciabatta medianos
300 g root beef (can be skirt, back or boned Rib), with thin sheets)
500 ml de caldo de res casero o de buena calidad
60 ml de vino tinto seco ((opcional para mayor profundidad de sabor))
2  rebanadas de queso provolone o suizo

instructions: In a medium pot, melt the butter and pits the onion and garlic until they are golden and caramelized.
Add the red wine and let reduce to medium heat to enhance the taste.
It incorporates the stock of re, laurel, thyme and Worcestershire salsa. Cooking at low heat for 15 minutes. Withdraw the herbs and tighten with salt and pepper. That'll be the juice (au jus).
Put the meat sheets into the hot stock for 2 minutes to impregnate with flavour without overcooking them.
Abre los panes y, si lo deseas, tuesta ligeramente el interior para dar un contraste crujiente.
Filling with juicy meat, add caramelized onions and cheese if you choose to use them.
Serves the sandwich with a small bowl of hot juice next door to dive every bite.

fresh-bean-hummus-a-healthy-appetizer-wi.name: Fresh Bean Hummus, A Healthy Appetizer With Legumes
fresh-bean-hummus-a-healthy-appetizer-wi.original_name: Hummus de habas frescas, un saludable aperitivo con legumbres

ingredients.item: 80 ml de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Pizca de comino (opcional, para un toque extra de sabor)
1 teaspoon fresh aromatic herbs (as cilantro or mint, to decorate)

instructions: Wash first and then polish the pods by cutting up the ends and a longitudinal line with a knife so as to get the beans from inside. Put a sink with boiling water and as soon as you are at a tipple boiling point for 1-2 minutes. Drain the beans and quickly cold them under cold water or submerge them into a bowl with water and ice. That helps stop the cooking process and keeps its color and texture. To skin them tightens with a finger one of the ends and should come out the fresh bean separating from the skin without problem.

In a food processor or with a hand mixer, mix fresh beans, tahi, garlic, lemon juice and cumin (if you decide to add them). Triture up to a homogenous blend. With the processor currently in place, slowly pour extra virgin olive oil. It keeps processing till the mixture reaches a smooth and creamy consistency.

Test and adjust the salt and pepper as your preferences. If you want an extra touch of freshness, you can add more lemon juice. Transfer hummus to a bowl or plate. Do a small whirlpool at the top with a spoon, sprinkle sesame seeds, sweet pepenton, and some minced aromatic herbs, such as cilantro or mint. Add some fresh beans and scuba some olive oil above.
fresh-bean-hummus-a-healthy-appetizer-wi.category: Recetas de Aperitivos, Tapas y Pinchos

fresh-fruit-tart-with-mascarpone.name: Fresh Fruit Tart With Mascarpone

ingredients.prep: peeled and sliced, or as needed

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease 2 tart pans.
Make crust: Blend together flour, butter, and sugar in a large bowl using an electric mixer until combined. Divide mixture evenly and press into the bottoms of the prepared tart pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 12 to 15 minutes. Let cool completely.

While crusts are cooling, make filling: Beat together cream cheese, mascarpone cheese, sugar, vanilla, nutmeg, and cinnamon in a medium bowl using an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Spread mixture over cooled crusts.
Add topping: Arrange strawberries, blackberries, and kiwis over filling in desired design.
Make glaze: Mix together sugar and cornstarch in a small saucepan. Pour in water and lemon juice. Cook over medium heat until clear and thick, about 2 minutes. Let glaze cool completely.
Glaze the entire top of each tart gently using a pastry brush.

fresh-garlic-and-potato-quiche-lezzet.name: Fresh Garlic And Potato Quiche
instructions: 1. To prepare the dough, cut the butter you extract from the refrigerator into cubes and put it into the kitchen robot and add it on it.
2. Mix up to the lowest speed of the kitchen robot, like sand.
3.  Daha sonra tuzunu ve karabiberini ekleyin.
4. Translate several times and add single eggs.
5. Take it on the countertop after caring and knead 2 minutes.
6. Cover over the refrigerator, relax half an hour.
7. Spread the dough into the base and edges of special portioning containers to heat resistant person.
8. Pour a handful of dried beans for weight creation on it.
9. Preheated 150 degree bake in oven, 20-25 minutes.
10. Mix cream, milk, eggs, salt and pepper in a bowl for creamy mixture.
11. 11. Cut the potatoes you peel the bark for the inner mortar into a pot.
12. Add water until you go over.
12. August Cook potatoes for 8 minutes.
14 July Cook the fresh garlic until the fine chopped and softened in the olive oil.
15. Crush potatoes that you smoke and strain.
16. Add and mix garlic and grated mozzarella cheese with olive oil.
17. September Share the inner material with potatoes into the dough that you have already carried out cooking.
18. Pour on the creamy mixture.
19. September Cook for 25 minutes in oven set to 170 degrees.

fresh-lemonade.name: Fresh Lemonade
instructions: Simmer ½ cup sugar and ½ cup water in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until sugar dissolves.
Let cool 5 minutes.
Add the zest from 3 large lemons, removed in wide strips, and let steep 30 minutes.
Strain lemon syrup through a fine-mesh sieve into a large pitcher; discard zest.
Add ¾ cup fresh lemon juice and 3 cups of water; stir to combine.
Divide lemonade among 4 tall glasses filled with ice; garnish with lemon slices.

fresh-raspberry-mojito.name: Fresh Raspberry Mojito
instructions: Muddle mint leaves, raspberries, simple syrup, and lime juice together in a shaker.
Fill the shaker with ice and add vodka and rum; cover and shake until chilled.
Pour entire contents of shaker into a Collins glass and top with club soda.

fried-calamari-argiro.name: Fried Calamari

ingredients.item: 2 cups of village flower or mixture with corn meal
2 cups of village flower or mixture with corn meal

instructions: Heat the oil in a large deep pan or plastic pot, over high heat.
If you have a thermometer, the temperature should be about 185-190 degrees C.
In a bowl, add the flower and salt and mix.
After we drag the squids well, spread them to the salted flour.
Catch a handful of stuffed squid and put them in a fine colander
Shake 2-3 times to remove the exces flour and separate the rings.
We throw them in the hot oil, making sure they fall apart. Don't fall united and stick.
Hot oil should cover all squads.
Alle them to brown on one side and with a dribbled bow turn them into hot oil 1-2 times to brown around.
We put them in a bowl line with abstract paper to dry for 1-2 minutes.
Enjoy the warm, crispy and essential.
Careful, the lemon on them softens them. It's only nice for color in serving.

fried-egg-tacos-with-spicy-jam.name: Fried Egg Tacos With Spicy Jam

ingredients.item: Labneh (lebanese strained yogurt) or plain greek yogurt

instructions: Mix hot chili paste, vinegar, and honey in a small bowl. Place labneh in another small bowl; season with salt.

Heat oil in a medium nonstick skillet over medium-high. Crack eggs into pan and cook, shaking pan occasionally to keep eggs from sticking to each other, until edges are golden brown, about 2 minutes; season with salt. Carefully tilt skillet toward you so oil pools at front edge of pan. Spoon oil over egg whites, especially where they are still translucent, avoiding yolks, until set, about 1 minute.
Divide labneh between tortillas and top with eggs, chile jam, and scallions.

fried-rice-with-egg-argiro.name: Fried Rice With Egg

ingredients.item: 1 red onion cut into thin slides
1 tablespoon soy sauce with a little salt
1 piece of fishnet cut into thin stripes or 1 piece of Chicken
1 red and 1 yellow pepper cut into thin sticks
Beans or lentils or other sprouts
1 red onion cut into thin slides
1 tablespoon soy sauce with a little salt
1 piece of fishnet cut into thin stripes or 1 piece of Chicken
1 red and 1 yellow pepper cut into thin sticks
Beans or lentils or other sprouts

instructions: Heat in a pan 1 tablespoon oil.
Mix the meat until it is cooked for 4-5 minutes, add the onion to brown for 5-7 minutes, and then add the carrot and peppers.
Let them wither lightly.
Pull the vegetarians on one side of the wok and add some oil to the empty part of the pan.
Add the eggs and cook for 2 minutes, cook and break into pieces.
Mix all the actors of the pan, vegetarians, meat, eggs and add the soy and oyster sauce (you find them in large supermarkets at the point with Asian products).
Add the sprouts, the fresh onion and the season.
Add some soy sauce or oyster extra.
Serve the fried rice in a hot bowl.

frozen-pineapple-smoothie.name: Frozen Pineapple Smoothie
instructions: Combine pineapple, yogurt, and coconut milk in an electric blender and blend until smooth.

frozen-sunrise-margaritas.name: Frozen Sunrise Margaritas
instructions: 1. Spread a layer of salt in a shallow dish. Run lime wedge around the rims of 4 highball glasses to moisten; dip rims in salt.
2. Place orange juice concentrate, orange juice, tequila, Cointreau, and lime juice in a blender. Add ice and pulse until smooth. Divide margarita evenly among glasses.

3. Tilt glasses and pour 1 tablespoon grenadine down the side of each drink; grenadine will sink to the bottom and create a sunset effect. Garnish with orange slices and maraschino cherries and serve.

fruit-icebox-pie.name: Fruit Icebox Pie
instructions: In a medium bowl, cream together butter and confectioners sugar. mix in eggs and vanilla extract. Spread half of cookie crumbs into bottom of a 9 inch pie pan. Spread creamed mixture evenly over the crumbs.
Whip cream until soft peaks form. Gently fold in pineapple, bananas, dates, and nuts. Spread over butter mixture. Top with remaining cookie crumbs.
Cover tightly with plastic wrap. Chill 24 hours before serving.

fruit-salad-with-herb-citrus-mint-maple-.name: Fruit Salad With Herb, Citrus, Mint-maple, Or Basic Syrup

ingredients.prep: peeled and cut into large chunks
peeled, pitted, and cut into large chunks
peeled, pitted, and cut into large chunks

Cantaloupe or honeydew melon cut into large chunks
Fresh rosemary or mint sprigs if you're using herb syrup

instructions: Combine all the fruit in a large bowl and stir in one of the syrups. Garnish with the mint or rosemary sprigs if you're using Herb Syrup.

instructions: 1. Firstly cut the delicate and remove the grains into one container.
2. Small chop the shells of Mango and peud after peeling.
3. Cut the ratchet that you peel the shells with the blade and chop it in the form of cube.
4. Take the fruits in a bowl according to the size given in the recipe and mix it by adding a teaspoon of honey on it.
5. In order to bring the consistency of urea, you can spend it from the blender.
